---
title: "Session 08 teaching notes: Python 5"
session_id: session-08
event_id: null
---

## Session 8 â€” Sequences and conditionals

TOOD: include visualization of IBAN

p.91: nr 3: hausaufgabe
p.97 nr 2 hausaufgabe

tuples: kurz (zB. pandas: df.shape, ...)

p.105: 3 hausaufgabe
-> nr 4: explain in-class (importance of code in/outside of if) 
p. 106/107: homework (tutorium)

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise          | Summary                                                                                                                   | Files                                                                                                              | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------- |
|   91â€“92 | Strings and IBAN  | Perform string inspection and manipulation and calculate an IBAN validation number from user input.                       | `String1.py`<br>`String2.py`<br>`String3.py`<br>`IBAN.py`                                                          |                      |
|      97 | List operations   | Create, inspect, extend, reorder, and modify lists and calculate values derived from their elements.                      | `Listexercise1.py`<br>`Listexercise2.py`                                                                           |                      |
| 105â€“107 | Conditional logic | Implement odd/even checks, discounts, rating-based interest, a dice game, temperature conversion, grades, and income tax. | `OddEven.py`<br>`Discount.py`<br>`AnnuityLoan2.py`<br>`Dicegame1.py`<br>`Temperature.py`<br>`Grade.py`<br>`Tax.py` |                      |


::: {.teaching-break}
â˜• Break â€” 10 minutes
:::

## Summary and announcements (next session)

TODO

<!--
    ## Session overview

    - **Focus:** Python
    - **Session title:** Python 1
    - **Coverage target:** Until **Accessing data**

    ## Before class

    - [ ] Review the session slides/materials.
    - [ ] Prepare files, datasets, and examples.
    - [ ] Note any announcements or reminders.

    ## Timing record

    Use this table while preparing or after teaching to record the actual timing.

    | Planned time | Actual time | Topic/activity | Notes for next time |
    |---|---|---|---|
    | 0--10 min |  | Setup / recap |  |
    | 10--30 min |  | Main input |  |
    | 30--60 min |  | Guided practice |  |
    | 60--80 min |  | Independent practice / questions |  |
    | 80--90 min |  | Wrap-up |  |

    ## Notes during class

    - TBD

    ## Follow-up

    - [ ] Update examples or instructions.
    - [ ] Record common questions.
    - [ ] Add reminders for the next session.
-->
